name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change to shunt
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**

<!-- What are you trying to do that shunt makes hard or impossible? -->

**Proposed change**

<!-- What would you like shunt to do? Sketch the smallest version that solves your problem. -->

**Alternatives considered**

<!-- Workarounds you've tried or rejected, and why. -->

**Scope check**

shunt aims to stay a small harness around Claude Code. If your request adds a new agent
loop, a heavy dependency, or platform-specific logic, please say a word about why it belongs
in shunt rather than a fork or a separate tool.
